name: Shantui Construction Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Shantui Construction Machinery Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells engine products and components of earth moving, pavement construction and compaction, building, hoisting, and other construction machinery products in China and internationally. The company offers bulldozers, excavators, road machinery, wheel loaders, and concrete machinery, as well as fire vehicles, aerial platform vehicles, and cranes. It also provides construction machinery spare parts comprising chassis parts, drive parts, structural parts, casting parts, and hydraulic oil cylinders; and after-sales and technical services. Shantui Construction Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Jining, China.
